post.description: This operation deletes entities by their IDs or with a boolean expression.

zh-CN.description: 根据 ID 或布尔表达式删除 Entity。
数据库名称。

collectionName.description: The name of the collection from which entities are to be deleted.

zh-CN.description: 待删除 Entity 的目标 Collection。

filter.description: A scalar filtering condition to filter matching entities. You can set this parameter to an empty string to skip scalar filtering. To build a scalar filtering condition, refer to <include target="milvus">[Boolean Expression Rules](https://milvus.io/docs/boolean.md)</include><include target="zilliz">[Reference on Scalar Filters](/docs/get-and-scalar-query#reference-on-scalar-filters)</include>.

zh-CN.description: 标量过滤条件，用于过滤匹配的 Entity。要构建标量过滤条件，请参考<include target="milvus">[布尔表达式规则](https://milvus.io/docs/boolean.md)</include><include target="zilliz">[标量过滤器参考](/docs/get-and-scalar-query#reference-on-scalar-filters)</include>。

partitionName.description:
The name of a partition in the current collection. 
If specified, the data is to be deleted from the specified partition.

zh-CN.description:
当前 Collection 中的 Partition 名称。
如果指定，则从指定的 Partition 中删除数据。

id.description: The primary key of the entity to delete. You can use this parameter instead of `filter` to delete a single entity by its ID.

zh-CN.description: 待删除 Entity 的主键。可以使用此参数替代 `filter` 来按主键删除单个 Entity。

exprParams.description: Expression template parameter values for parameterized filter expressions.

zh-CN.description: 返回空对象。
响应码。

cost.description: Cost of this operation.<include target="zilliz"> This applies to free and serverless clusters only, indicating the vCU usage of the current request.</include>

zh-CN.description: 当前操作的花费。<include target="zilliz">仅用于 Free 和 Serverless 集群，表示当前操作消耗的 vCU。

data.description: Response payload which is an empty object.

zh-CN.description: 响应载荷，为空对象。
返回错误消息。
响应码。
错误描述。

post.description: This operation inserts data into a specific collection.

zh-CN.description: 本接口向指定 Collection 中插入 Entity。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥或</include>用冒号分隔的用户名和密码，如 `username:password`。

dbName.description: The name of the target database.

zh-CN.description: 目标数据库名称。

collectionName.description: The name of an existing collection.

zh-CN.description: 已存在的 Collection 名称。

data.description: An entity object or an array of entity objects. Note that the keys in an entity object should match the collection schema

zh-CN.description: Entity 对象或 Entity 对象数组。注意，Entity 对象的结构应与 Collection Schema 一致。

oneOf.description: A single entity, whose structure should match the schema of the target collection.

zh-CN.description: 单个 Entity 对象，其结构应与目标 Collection 的 Schema 一致。

oneOf.description: A list of entities, each of which should match the schema of the target collection.

zh-CN.description: Entity 对象列表，每个对象应与目标 Collection 的 Schema 一致。

items.description: An entity object, whose structure should match the schema of the target collection.

zh-CN.description: 一个 Entity 对象，其结构应与目标 Collection 的 Schema 一致。

partitionName.description:
The name of a partition in the current collection. 
If specified, the data is to be inserted into the specified partition.

zh-CN.description:
当前 Collection 中的 Partition 名称。
如果指定，则将数据插入指定的 Partition。

partialUpdate.description: Whether to enable partial updates. When enabled, only the specified fields are updated.

200.description: A dictionary contains information about the number of inserted entities.

zh-CN.description: 返回一个包含成功插入 Entity 条数相关信息的字典。
响应码。

cost.description: Cost of this operation.<include target="zilliz"> This applies to free and serverless clusters only, indicating the vCU usage of the current request.</include>

zh-CN.description: 当前操作的花费。<include target="zilliz">仅用于 Free 和 Serverless 集群，表示当前操作消耗的 vCU。

data.description: Response payload which carries the results of this operation.

zh-CN.description: 响应负载，包含了当前操作的结果。
已插入 Entity 数量。

items.description: The ID of an inserted entity.

zh-CN.description: 一个已插入的 Entity 的 ID。

insertIds.description: An array of the IDs of inserted entities. Note: IDs are returned as strings unless the request includes the header `Accept-Type-Allow-Int64: true`.

zh-CN.description: 已插入 Entity 的 ID 列表。注意：除非请求包含头 `Accept-Type-Allow-Int64: true`，否则 ID 以字符串形式返回。
返回错误消息。
响应码。
错误描述。

post.description: This operation inserts new records into the database or updates existing ones.

zh-CN.description: 本接口用于向指定 Collection 中插入或更新数据。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥或</include>用冒号分隔的用户名和密码，如 `username:password`。
数据库名称。

collectionName.description: The name of the collection in which to upsert data.

zh-CN.description: 待插入或更新记录的目标 Collection 名称。

partitionName.description:
The name of a partition in the current collection. 
If specified, the data is to be inserted into the specified partition.

data.description: An entity object or an array of entity objects. Note that the keys in an entity object should match the collection schema

zh-CN.description: Entity 对象或 Entity 对象数组。注意，Entity 对象的结构应与 Collection Schema 一致。

partialUpdate.description: Whether to enable partial updates. When enabled, only the specified fields are updated.

zh-CN.description: 返回一个 MutationResult 对象。
响应码。

cost.description: Cost of this operation.<include target="zilliz"> This applies to free and serverless clusters only, indicating the vCU usage of the current request.</include>

zh-CN.description: 当前操作的花费。<include target="zilliz">仅用于 Free 和 Serverless 集群，表示当前操作消耗的 vCU。

data.description: Response payload which carries the result of the upsert operation.

zh-CN.description: 响应载荷，包含了 upsert 操作的结果。
插入或更新的 Entity 数量。

items.description: The ID of an upserted entity.

zh-CN.description: 一个插入或更新的 Entity ID。

upsertIds.description: An array of the IDs of upserted entities. Note: IDs are returned as strings unless the request includes the header `Accept-Type-Allow-Int64: true`.

zh-CN.description: 插入或更新的 Entity ID 列表。注意：除非请求包含头 `Accept-Type-Allow-Int64: true`，否则 ID 以字符串形式返回。

scanned_remote_bytes.description: Returned when the deployment uses tiered storage with usage tracking enabled and the operation reads from remote/disk storage. Omitted when all data is served from local cache.

zh-CN.description: 当部署使用 Tiered Storage 且已启用用量跟踪，并且操作从远程/磁盘存储读取数据时返回。当所有数据均从本地缓存提供时，此字段将被省略。

scanned_total_bytes.description: Returned when the deployment uses tiered storage with usage tracking enabled and the operation reads from remote/disk storage. Omitted when all data is served from local cache.

zh-CN.description: 当部署使用 Tiered Storage 且已启用用量跟踪，并且操作从远程/磁盘存储读取数据时返回。当所有数据均从本地缓存提供时，此字段将被省略。

cache_hit_ratio.description: Returned when the deployment uses tiered storage with usage tracking enabled and the operation reads from remote/disk storage. Omitted when all data is served from local cache.

zh-CN.description: 当部署使用 Tiered Storage 且已启用用量跟踪，并且操作从远程/磁盘存储读取数据时返回。当所有数据均从本地缓存提供时，此字段将被省略。
返回错误消息。
响应码。
错误描述。

post.description: This operation conducts a filtering on the scalar field with a specified boolean expression.

zh-CN.description: 本接口可使用指定的布尔表达式对标量字段进行过滤。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`. If you are using a project endpoint, only a valid API key with sufficient permissions applies.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥或</include>用冒号分隔的用户名和密码，如 `username:password`。

parameters.name: clusterId
parameters.description: The ID of the on-demand cluster that this operation will be performed on. This parameter applies only when you use an on-demand compute endpoint.

zh-CN.description: 按需集群 ID，此操作将在该集群上执行。此参数仅在使用项目端点（按需）时适用。
数据库名称。

collectionName.description: The name of the collection to which this operation applies.

zh-CN.description: Collection 名称。

filter.description: The filter used to find matches for the search.

zh-CN.description: 用于对标量字段进行过滤的表达式。
随查询结果返回的字段名称。

outputFields.description: An array of fields to return along with the query results.

zh-CN.description: 需要在查询结果中返回的字名称数组。
Partition 名称。

partitionNames.description: The name of the partitions to which this operation applies. Setting this parameter restricts the operation to the specified partitions. If not set, the operation applies to all partitions in the collection.

zh-CN.description: Partition 名称列表。设置此参数可限制操作范围到指定的 Partition。未设置时，操作范围为 Collection 中的所有 Partition。

limit.description:
The total number of entities to return.
You can use this parameter in combination with **offset** in **param** to enable pagination.
The sum of this value and **offset** in **param** should be less than 16,384.

zh-CN.description:
需要在搜索结果中返回的 Entity 数量。
您可以使用此参数与 **offset** 参数结合使用以实现分页。
此值与 **offset** 参数之和不应超过 16,384。

offset.description:
The number of records to skip in the search result. 
You can use this parameter in combination with limit to enable pagination. 
The sum of this value and limit should be less than 16,384.

zh-CN.description:
需要在搜索结果中跳过的 Entity 数量。
您可以使用此参数与 **limit** 参数结合使用以实现分页。
此值与 **limit** 参数之和不应超过 16,384。

exprParams.description: Expression template parameter values for parameterized filter expressions.

consistencyLevel.description: Consistency level. Possible values are **Strong**, **Session**, **Bounded**, and **Eventually**.

200.description: A list of dictionaries with each dictionary representing a queried entity.

zh-CN.description: 返回查询到的 Entity 列表，每个字典表示一个查询到的 Entity。
响应码。

cost.description: Cost of this operation.<include target="zilliz"> This applies to free and serverless clusters only, indicating the vCU usage of the current request.</include>

zh-CN.description: 当前操作的花费。<include target="zilliz">仅用于 Free 和 Serverless 集群，表示当前操作消耗的 vCU。

data.description: A list of dictionaries with each dictionary representing a queried entity.

zh-CN.description: 查询到的 Entity 列表，每个字典表示一个查询到的 Entity。
Entity 对象。

scanned_remote_bytes.description: Returned when the deployment uses tiered storage with usage tracking enabled and the operation reads from remote/disk storage. Omitted when all data is served from local cache.

zh-CN.description: 当部署使用 Tiered Storage 且已启用用量跟踪，并且操作从远程/磁盘存储读取数据时返回。当所有数据均从本地缓存提供时，此字段将被省略。

scanned_total_bytes.description: Returned when the deployment uses tiered storage with usage tracking enabled and the operation reads from remote/disk storage. Omitted when all data is served from local cache.

zh-CN.description: 当部署使用 Tiered Storage 且已启用用量跟踪，并且操作从远程/磁盘存储读取数据时返回。当所有数据均从本地缓存提供时，此字段将被省略。

cache_hit_ratio.description: Returned when the deployment uses tiered storage with usage tracking enabled and the operation reads from remote/disk storage. Omitted when all data is served from local cache.

zh-CN.description: 当部署使用 Tiered Storage 且已启用用量跟踪，并且操作从远程/磁盘存储读取数据时返回。当所有数据均从本地缓存提供时，此字段将被省略。
返回错误消息。
响应码。
错误描述。

post.description: This operation conducts a vector similarity search with an optional scalar filtering expression.

zh-CN.description: 本接口可以执行向量相似性搜索。您也可以在搜索指令中包含一个可选的标量过滤表达式。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`. If you are using a project endpoint, only a valid API key with sufficient permissions applies.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥或</include>用冒号分隔的用户名和密码，如 `username:password`。

parameters.name: clusterId
parameters.description: The ID of the on-demand cluster that search will be performed on. This parameter applies only when you use an on-demand compute endpoint.

zh-CN.description: 按需集群 ID，搜索将在该集群上执行。此参数仅在使用项目端点（按需）时适用。
数据库名称。

collectionName.description: The name of the collection to which this operation applies.

zh-CN.description: 当前操作的目标 Collection 名称。
一个向量嵌入。

items.description: A dimension value of the vector embedding

zh-CN.description: 向量嵌入的一个维度值。

data.description:
A list of vector embeddings.
MilvusZilliz Cloud searches for the most similar vector embeddings to the specified ones.
This parameter is mutually exclusive with **ids**.

zh-CN.description:
一个向量嵌入列表。
MilvusZilliz Cloud 会搜索与指定向量嵌入最相似的向量。
该参数与 **ids** 互斥。

ids.description:
A list of primary keys.
MilvusZilliz Cloud searches for the most similar vector embeddings to those in the specified entities.
This parameter is mutually exclusive with **data**.

zh-CN.description: 一个主键

一个主键列表。
MilvusZilliz Cloud 会搜索与指定 Entity 中的向量嵌入最相似的向量。
该参数与 **data** 互斥。

annsField.description: The name of the vector field.

zh-CN.description: 向量字段名称。

filter.description: The filter used to find matches for the search.

zh-CN.description: 在检索结果中根据标量字段进行过滤的表达式。

groupingField.description: Groups search results by a specified field to ensure diversity and avoid returning multiple results from the same group.

zh-CN.description: 对搜索结果进行分组，以确保结果的多样性，并避免返回来自同一组的多个结果。

groupSize.description: The number of entities to return for each group. This parameter is only valid when `groupingField` is specified.

zh-CN.description: 每个组返回的 Entity 数量。该参数仅在 `groupingField` 被指定时有效。

strictGroupSize.description: Whether to return only the top k entities for each group. This parameter is only valid when `groupingField` is specified.

zh-CN.description: 是否仅返回每个组的前 k 个 Entity。该参数仅在 `groupingField` 被指定时有效。

limit.description:
The total number of entities to return.
You can use this parameter in combination with **offset** in **param** to enable pagination.
The sum of this value and **offset** in **param** should be less than 16,384.

zh-CN.description:
需要在搜索结果中返回的 Entity 数量。
您可以使用此参数与 **offset** 参数结合使用以实现分页。
此值与 **offset** 参数之和不应超过 16,384。

offset.description:
The number of records to skip in the search result. 
You can use this parameter in combination with limit to enable pagination. 
The sum of this value and limit should be less than 16,384.

zh-CN.description:
需要在搜索结果中跳过的 Entity 数量。
您可以使用此参数与 **limit** 参数结合使用以实现分页。
此值与 **limit** 参数之和不应超过 16,384。
字段名称

outputFields.description: An array of fields to return along with the search results.

zh-CN.description: 需要在搜索结果中包含的字段名称列表。

searchParams.description: The parameter settings specific to this operation.

zh-CN.description: 当前操作的附加参数。

metricType.description: The name of the metric type that applies to the current search. The value should be the same as the metric type of the target collection.

zh-CN.description: 当前操作使用的相似度度量类型。该值应与目标 Collection 的度量类型相同。
其它附加参数。

radius.description: Determines the threshold of least similarity. When setting metric_type to L2, ensure that this value is greater than that of range_filter. Otherwise, this value should be lower than that of range_filter.

zh-CN.description: 确定最低相似度阈值。当设置 metric_type 为 L2 时，请确保该值大于 range_filter 的值。否则，该值应小于 range_filter 的值。

range_filter.description: Refines the search to vectors within a specific similarity range. When setting metric_type to IP or COSINE, ensure that this value is greater than that of radius. Otherwise, this value should be lower than that of radius.

zh-CN.description: 优化搜索结果的相似度范围。当设置 metric_type 为 IP 或 COSINE 时，请确保该值大于 radius 的值。否则，该值应小于 radius 的值。
一个 Partition 名称。

partitionNames.description: The name of the partitions to which this operation applies. Setting this parameter indicates that the search is within the specified partitions. Otherwise, the search is across all partitions in the collection.

zh-CN.description: 一个 Partition 名称列表。设置此参数表示搜索仅限于指定的 Partition。否则，搜索会在 Collection 中搜索所有 Partition。

consistencyLevel.description: The consistency level of the search operation. The value should be the same as the consistency level of the target collection.

zh-CN.description: 当前搜索操作的一致性级别。

exprParams.description: A set of key-value pairs that can be filled back in to the `filter` parameter to enable filtering templating. For details, refer to <include target="milvus">[Filtering Templating](https://milvus.io/docs/filtering-templating.md)</include><include target="zilliz">[Filter Templating](/docs/filtering-templating)</include>.

x-i18n.description: 一组键值对，可以回填 `filter` 字段中的变量，以启用过滤表达式模板。详情请参阅<include target="milvus">[Filtering Templating](https://milvus.io/docs/filtering-templating.md)</include><include target="zilliz">[Filter Templating](/docs/filtering-templating)</include>.

functionScore.description: Function settings for the current search request.

zh-CN.description: 当前搜索请求的 Function 设置。

name.description: The name of the function to apply.

zh-CN.description: 待应用的 Function 名称。

description.description: The description of the function to apply.

zh-CN.description: 待应用的 Function 描述。

type.description: The type of the function to apply.

zh-CN.description: 待应用的 Function 类型。

inputFieldNames.description: A list of scalar fields to use as input for the function.

zh-CN.description: 作为 Function 输入的标量字段名称列表。

items.description: A scalar field to use as input for the function.

zh-CN.description: 作为 Function 输入的一个标量字段名称。

outputFieldNames.description: A list of vector fields to use as output for the function.

zh-CN.description: 作为 Function 输出的向量字段名称列表。

items.description: A vector field to use as output for the function.

zh-CN.description: 作为 Function 输出的一个向量字段名称。

params.description: Extra parameters for the function in key-value pairs.

zh-CN.description: Function 附加参数，以键值对形式提供。

params.description: Extra parameters for the search in key-value pairs.

zh-CN.description: 搜索附加参数，以键值对形式提供。
返回搜索结果。
响应码。

cost.description: Cost of this operation.<include target="zilliz"> This applies to free and serverless clusters only, indicating the vCU usage of the current request.</include>

zh-CN.description: 当前操作的花费。<include target="zilliz">仅用于 Free 和 Serverless 集群，表示当前操作消耗的 vCU。
搜索结果，为一组 Entity 对象。
一个返回的 Entity 对象。

recalls.description: Recall values for each search result group.

zh-CN.description: 每组搜索结果的召回率值。

topks.description: The number of top-K results returned for each query vector.

zh-CN.description: 每个查询向量返回的 Top-K 结果数量。

scanned_remote_bytes.description: Returned when the deployment uses tiered storage with usage tracking enabled and the operation reads from remote/disk storage. Omitted when all data is served from local cache.

zh-CN.description: 当部署使用 Tiered Storage 且已启用用量跟踪，并且操作从远程/磁盘存储读取数据时返回。当所有数据均从本地缓存提供时，此字段将被省略。

scanned_total_bytes.description: Returned when the deployment uses tiered storage with usage tracking enabled and the operation reads from remote/disk storage. Omitted when all data is served from local cache.

zh-CN.description: 当部署使用 Tiered Storage 且已启用用量跟踪，并且操作从远程/磁盘存储读取数据时返回。当所有数据均从本地缓存提供时，此字段将被省略。

cache_hit_ratio.description: Returned when the deployment uses tiered storage with usage tracking enabled and the operation reads from remote/disk storage. Omitted when all data is served from local cache.

zh-CN.description: 当部署使用 Tiered Storage 且已启用用量跟踪，并且操作从远程/磁盘存储读取数据时返回。当所有数据均从本地缓存提供时，此字段将被省略。
返回错误消息。
响应码。
错误描述。

post.description: This operation searches for entities based on vector similarity and scalar filtering and reranks the results using a specified strategy.

zh-CN.description: 本接口基于向量相似度和标量过滤条件，搜索实体并使用指定策略重新排序结果。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`. If you are using a project endpoint, only a valid API key with sufficient permissions applies.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥或</include>用冒号分隔的用户名和密码，如 `username:password`。

parameters.name: clusterId
parameters.description: The ID of the on-demand cluster that this operation will be performed on. This parameter applies only when you use an on-demand compute endpoint.

zh-CN.description: 按需集群 ID，此操作将在该集群上执行。此参数仅在使用项目端点（按需）时适用。
数据库名称。

collectionName.description: The name of the collection to which this operation applies.

zh-CN.description: Collection 名称。
一个 Partition 名称。

partitionNames.description: The name of the partitions to which this operation applies. Setting this parameter indicates that the search is within the specified partitions. Otherwise, the search is across all partitions in the collection.

zh-CN.description: Partition 名称列表。设置此参数表示搜索仅限于指定的 Partition。否则，搜索会在 Collection 中搜索所有 Partition。

items.description: Search parameter for a vector field.

zh-CN.description: 当前向量字段的检索参数。
一个向量嵌入。

data.description: A list of vector embeddings.<include target="milvus">Milvus</include><include target="zilliz">Zilliz Cloud</include> searches for the most similar vector embeddings to the specified ones.

zh-CN.description: 一个向量嵌入列表。<include target="milvus">Milvus</include><include target="zilliz">Zilliz Cloud</include> 会搜索与指定向量嵌入最相似的向量。

annsField.description: The name of the vector field.

zh-CN.description: 向量字段名称。
标量过滤条件。

groupingField.description: The name of the field that serve as the aggregation criteria.

zh-CN.description: 用于分组聚合的字段名称。

metricType.description: The name of the metric type that applies to the current search. The value should be the same as the metric type of the target collection.

zh-CN.description: 当前搜索所使用的度量类型。该值应与目标 Collection 的度量类型相同。

limit.description: The number of entities to return.

zh-CN.description: 需要返回的 Entity 数量。

offset.description: The number of entities to skip in the returned entities.

zh-CN.description: 需要在搜索结果中跳过的 Entity 数量。

ignoreGrowing.description: Whether to ignore the entities found in the growing segments.

zh-CN.description: 搜索时是否需要忽略 Growing Segment 中的 Entity。

radius.description: Determines the threshold of least similarity. When setting metric_type to L2, ensure that this value is greater than that of range_filter. Otherwise, this value should be lower than that of range_filter.

zh-CN.description: 确定最不相似向量的阈值。当设置 metric_type 为 L2 时，请确保该值大于 range_filter 的值。否则，该值应小于 range_filter 的值。

range_filter.description: Refines the search to vectors within a specific similarity range. When setting metric_type to IP or COSINE, ensure that this value is greater than that of radius. Otherwise, this value should be lower than that of radius.

zh-CN.description: 优化搜索结果的相似度范围。当设置 metric_type 为 IP 或 COSINE 时，请确保该值大于 radius 的值。否则，该值应小于 radius 的值。

exprParams.description: Expression template parameter values for parameterized filter expressions.

zh-CN.description: 搜索参数。

strategy.description: The name of the reranking strategy.

zh-CN.description: 重新排序策略。

k.description: A tunable constant in the RRF algorithm. This applies only when the strategy is set to `rrf`.

zh-CN.description: 可调节常数。仅当策略设置为 `rrf` 时适用。

params.description: A set of parameters related to the specified strategy

zh-CN.description: 指定重新排序策略的参数。
重新排序策略。

limit.description:
The total number of entities to return.
You can use this parameter in combination with **offset** in **param** to enable pagination.
The sum of this value and **offset** in **param** should be less than 16,384.

zh-CN.description:
需要返回的 Entity 总数。
您可以使用此参数与 **param** 中的 **offset** 结合使用，实现分页。
此值与 **param** 中的 **offset** 之和应小于 16,384。

groupSize.description: The number of entities to return for each group. This parameter is only valid when `groupingField` is specified.

zh-CN.description: 每个组返回的 Entity 数量。该参数仅在 `groupingField` 被指定时有效。

strictGroupSize.description: Whether to return only the top k entities for each group. This parameter is only valid when `groupingField` is specified.

zh-CN.description: 是否仅返回每个组的前 k 个 Entity。该参数仅在 `groupingField` 被指定时有效。
字段名称

outputFields.description: An array of fields to return along with the search results.

zh-CN.description: 搜索结果中需要包含的字段列表。

consistencyLevel.description: The consistency level of the search operation. The value should be the same as the consistency level of the target collection.

zh-CN.description: 当前搜索操作的一致性级别。

functionScore.description: Function settings for the current search request.

zh-CN.description: 当前搜索请求的 Function 设置。

name.description: The name of the function to apply.

zh-CN.description: 待应用的 Function 名称。

description.description: The description of the function to apply.

zh-CN.description: 待应用的 Function 描述。

type.description: The type of the function to apply.

zh-CN.description: 待应用的 Function 类型。

inputFieldNames.description: A list of scalar fields to use as input for the function.

zh-CN.description: 作为 Function 输入的标量字段名称列表。

items.description: A scalar field to use as input for the function.

zh-CN.description: 作为 Function 输入的一个标量字段名称。

outputFieldNames.description: A list of vector fields to use as output for the function.

zh-CN.description: 作为 Function 输出的向量字段名称列表。

items.description: A vector field to use as output for the function.

zh-CN.description: 作为 Function 输出的一个向量字段名称。

params.description: Extra parameters for the function in key-value pairs.

zh-CN.description: Function 附加参数，以键值对形式提供。

offset.description: Number of records to skip in the search results.

groupingField.description: Name of the field to group search results by.

zh-CN.description: 返回搜索结果。
响应码。

cost.description: Cost of this operation.<include target="zilliz"> This applies to free and serverless clusters only, indicating the vCU usage of the current request.</include>

zh-CN.description: 当前操作的花费。<include target="zilliz">仅用于 Free 和 Serverless 集群，表示当前操作消耗的 vCU。
搜索结果。

zh-CN.descripiton: 一个返回的 Entity 对象。

topks.description: The number of top-K results returned for each query vector.

zh-CN.description: 每个查询向量返回的 Top-K 结果数量。

scanned_remote_bytes.description: Returned when the deployment uses tiered storage with usage tracking enabled and the operation reads from remote/disk storage. Omitted when all data is served from local cache.

zh-CN.description: 当部署使用 Tiered Storage 且已启用用量跟踪，并且操作从远程/磁盘存储读取数据时返回。当所有数据均从本地缓存提供时，此字段将被省略。

scanned_total_bytes.description: Returned when the deployment uses tiered storage with usage tracking enabled and the operation reads from remote/disk storage. Omitted when all data is served from local cache.

zh-CN.description: 当部署使用 Tiered Storage 且已启用用量跟踪，并且操作从远程/磁盘存储读取数据时返回。当所有数据均从本地缓存提供时，此字段将被省略。

cache_hit_ratio.description: Returned when the deployment uses tiered storage with usage tracking enabled and the operation reads from remote/disk storage. Omitted when all data is served from local cache.

zh-CN.description: 当部署使用 Tiered Storage 且已启用用量跟踪，并且操作从远程/磁盘存储读取数据时返回。当所有数据均从本地缓存提供时，此字段将被省略。
返回错误消息。
响应码。
错误描述。

post.description: This operation gets specific entities by their IDs.

zh-CN.description: 本接口用于获取指定 ID 的 Entity。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`. If you are using a project endpoint, only a valid API key with sufficient permissions applies.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥或</include>用冒号分隔的用户名和密码，如 `username:password`。

parameters.name: clusterId
parameters.description: The ID of the on-demand cluster that this operation will be performed on. This parameter applies only when you use an on-demand compute endpoint.

zh-CN.description: 按需集群 ID，此操作将在该集群上执行。此参数仅在使用项目端点（按需）时适用。
数据库名称。

collectionName.description: The name of the collection to which this operation applies.

zh-CN.description: Collection 名称。

id.description: A specific entity ID or a list of entity IDs.

zh-CN.description: Entity ID 或 Entity ID 列表。
随查询结果返回的字段名称。

outputFields.description: An array of fields to return along with the query results.

zh-CN.description: 需要随查询结果返回的字段列表。
Partition 名称。

partitionNames.description: The name of the partitions to which this operation applies.

zh-CN.description: Partition 名称列表。

consistencyLevel.description: The consistency level for this operation. The default value is `Bounded`.

zh-CN.description: 操作的一致性级别。默认为 `Bounded`。

partitionName.description: Name of the partition to get entities from.

zh-CN.description: 返回查询结果。
响应码。

cost.description: Cost of this operation.<include target="zilliz"> This applies to free and serverless clusters only, indicating the vCU usage of the current request.</include>

zh-CN.description: 当前操作的花费。<include target="zilliz">仅用于 Free 和 Serverless 集群，表示当前操作消耗的 vCU。
查询结果。
返回的一个 Entity 对象。

scanned_remote_bytes.description: Returned when the deployment uses tiered storage with usage tracking enabled and the operation reads from remote/disk storage. Omitted when all data is served from local cache.

zh-CN.description: 当部署使用 Tiered Storage 且已启用用量跟踪，并且操作从远程/磁盘存储读取数据时返回。当所有数据均从本地缓存提供时，此字段将被省略。

scanned_total_bytes.description: Returned when the deployment uses tiered storage with usage tracking enabled and the operation reads from remote/disk storage. Omitted when all data is served from local cache.

zh-CN.description: 当部署使用 Tiered Storage 且已启用用量跟踪，并且操作从远程/磁盘存储读取数据时返回。当所有数据均从本地缓存提供时，此字段将被省略。

cache_hit_ratio.description: Returned when the deployment uses tiered storage with usage tracking enabled and the operation reads from remote/disk storage. Omitted when all data is served from local cache.

zh-CN.description: 当部署使用 Tiered Storage 且已启用用量跟踪，并且操作从远程/磁盘存储读取数据时返回。当所有数据均从本地缓存提供时，此字段将被省略。
返回错误消息。
响应码。
错误描述。

AuthorizationHeader.name: Authorization
AuthorizationHeader.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`. If you are using a project endpoint, only a valid API key with sufficient permissions applies.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥或</include>用冒号分隔的用户名和密码，如 `username:password`。如果您使用的是项目端点，则仅具备足够权限的有效 API 密钥适用。

ZillizVectorV2.label: Cluster Endpoint
ZillizVectorV2.prompt:
Use the cluster endpoint if you are using serving clusters.

  • Free & Serverless

    https://{cluster-id}.serverless.{region}.vectordb.zillizcloud.com

  • Dedicated

    https://{cluster-id}.{region}.vectordb.zillizcloud.com:19530

zh-CN.label: 集群端点
zh-CN.prompt:
如果您使用的是服务集群，请使用集群端点。

  • Free 与 Serverless 版

    https://{cluster-id}.serverless.{region}.vectordb.zillizcloud.com

  • Dedicated 版

    https://{cluster-id}.{region}.vectordb.zillizcloud.com:19530

ZillizVectorV2.label: Project Endpoint (On-Demand)
ZillizVectorV2.prompt:
Use the on-demand compute endpoint if you are using on-demand clusters.

https://{project-id}.{region}.api.zillizcloud.com

zh-CN.label: 项目端点（按需）
zh-CN.prompt:
如果您使用的是按需集群，请使用项目端点（按需）。

https://{project-id}.{region}.api.zillizcloud.com
